name: Fascina
description: Dual complex VCA with anti-click dynamics, CV and audio control, and hard limiting. The module can act as a saturator, sidechain element, envelope follower or compact compressor.

controls.name: Drive
controls.description: Pushes the VCA into the limiter and saturator region.

controls.name: CV Attenuverter
controls.description: Attenuates or inverts the CV input.

controls.name: Ctrl Attenuverter
controls.description: Attenuates or inverts the control-input signal.

inputs.name: VCA IN
inputs.description: Audio or CV input to the main VCA.

inputs.name: VCA CV IN
inputs.description: Main control-voltage input for the VCA level.

inputs.name: CONTROL IN
inputs.description: Audio input to the control VCA, used for ducking, expansion and envelope-follower style routing.

inputs.name: CTRL CV IN
inputs.description: Control-voltage input for the control VCA path.

outputs.name: VCA OUT
outputs.description: Audio or CV output of the main VCA.

behaviors.name: Anti-click gating
behaviors.trigger: short envelope into VCA CV IN
behaviors.description: The anti-click system keeps fast attacks clean, so percussive envelopes do not produce zipper noise or pops.

behaviors.name: Control-path modulation
behaviors.description: The control input can be treated as a second audio-rate modulator, making ducking, expansion and sidechain-style movement easy to patch.

behaviors.name: Limiter drive
behaviors.description: Drive pushes the circuit into a limiter and saturator range, turning the VCA into a compact distortion stage.

behaviors.name: Dynamic ducking
behaviors.description: Inverted control input produces ducking rather than expansion, so another audio stream can pull the level down instead of up.

behaviors.name: Patch-programmable dynamics
behaviors.description: The module can be re-purposed as an envelope follower, sample-and-hold source, preamp or stereo compressor depending on how the two VCAs are patched.

patchIdeas.name: Clickless pluck
patchIdeas.patch: Short envelope into VCA CV IN · Drive low · Anti-click on · the module behaves like a fast clean VCA for plucks and bass accents.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Fascina:
* Anti-click: on
* Drive: low

Envelope:
VCO:
Output:

- Envelope (Out) >> Fascina (VCA CV IN)
- VCO (Out) -> Fascina (VCA IN)
- Fascina (VCA OUT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Sidechain ducking
patchIdeas.patch: Kick audio into CONTROL IN · inversion on the ctrl attenuverter for ducking · pad audio into VCA IN · the kick briefly pulls the pad down without a separate compressor.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Fascina:
* Ctrl attenuverter: negative

Kick:
Pad:
Output:

- Kick (Out) -> Fascina (CONTROL IN)
- Pad (Out) -> Fascina (VCA IN)
- Kick (Out) >> Fascina (CTRL CV IN)
- Fascina (VCA OUT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Dirty preamp
patchIdeas.patch: Audio source into VCA IN · Drive up · Level trimmed back after saturation · the module becomes a compact preamp and limiter for modular or line-level sources.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Fascina:
* Drive: high
* Level: trimmed

Audio Source:
Filter:
Output:

- Audio Source (Out) -> Fascina (VCA IN)
- Fascina (VCA OUT) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Dual distortion bus
patchIdeas.patch: Patch a drum bus into the VCA path and modulate the control path with a second audio source · the result is a dual-stage distortion with rhythmically moving gain structure.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Fascina:
* Drive: medium-high

Drum Bus:
Modulator:
Output:

- Drum Bus (Out) -> Fascina (VCA IN)
- Modulator (Out) -> Fascina (CONTROL IN)
- Fascina (VCA OUT) -> Output (In)
